title: MagicBows
description: Create your custom bows with new mechanics that will add a unique touch to your server!
body:
# MagicBows
### Out of date, soon a recode with new features, more version support and optimization!

Create your custom bows with epic mechanics!

**Wiki**
* **[Click here!](https://josielcm.gitbook.io/magicbows-wiki/)**

**_Features_**
* Custom Bows
* Generate structures
* Teleport
* Particles
* Sounds
* Adding enchantments
* Cooldowns
* Explosion
* Edit Item Flags
* More options will be added in future updates.

**_Commands_**
* **/mb**
* /magicbow get <name of bow>
* /magicbow reload

**_Permissions_**
* magicbows.command
* magicbows.error
* magicbows.command.tabcomplete
* You can add Customs Permissions for bows

**_Install_**
* To use this plugin just download it right here, and drop it into your `plugins/` directory.
* Check the **[Wiki](https://josielcm.gitbook.io/magicbows-wiki/)** for more information on its use.

**Support** _Discord:_ **josielcm#8990**
